title: Feynman Technique Reimagined
description: Modern tools for an ancient method.
content:
Methodology

The Feynman technique involves teaching a concept to a child. By forcing yourself to explain things without jargon, you quickly identify the gaps in your own understanding.

Modern tools allow us to instantly scale this technique. You can provide your complex notes and ask AI to translate it into an ELI5 framework, instantly giving you a mirror of your own knowledge base.
